data.content: Shipment blocked by merge conflicts while merging foolery-67b5 onto origin/main. Conflicts need implementation resolution in scripts/agent-wizard.sh, scripts/setup.sh, src/components/__tests__/settings-agents-scanned.test.ts, src/components/settings-agents-hooks.tsx, src/components/settings-agents-scanned.tsx, and src/components/settings-agents-section.tsx. Merge was aborted; no main push or state transition was performed.
